title: DHA Phase 6 Residence

images.alt: Front elevation of DHA Phase 6 residence
Double-height living space with modern detailing
Master bedroom interior with warm finishes

description:
A premium 10-marla residence in DHA Phase 6, Lahore, delivered as a complete turnkey project from structural execution to final fit-out.

Project highlights:
- Full grey structure execution with engineered foundations and slab system
- Premium finishing package including stone, wood, and imported fixtures
- Integrated interior design for living spaces, bedrooms, and kitchen

The client requested a modern, low-maintenance home with abundant natural light. Our team coordinated architecture, civil works, MEP, and interior detailing to deliver a cohesive result within the agreed timeline.
